shortDescription.default: Display any SharePoint list or document library with modern search, filtering, and display styles.

longDescription.default: Content Library lets page authors connect to any SharePoint list or document library and present it with modern card, tile, table, and dashboard layouts. Includes optional keyword search, category filtering with colour coding, per-item icon overrides, and fully configurable display styles — all without leaving the page.

features.title: Content Library Feature
features.description: Activates the Content Library web part.
